base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_explosion_red — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1981 galaga. iconic cross-shape expansion. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame red explosion burst — iconic cross-shape expansion → fade; plays on any enemy destruction
